mapper.sql: id, order_sn, idempotent_key, user_id, merchant_id, pickup_point_id, address_id, consignee, phone, province, city, district, detailed_address, total_amount, pay_amount, delivery_type, status, create_time, pay_expire_time, pay_time, cancel_time, discount_amount, delivery_fee, seckill_discount, bargain_discount, promotion_discount, coupon_discount, merchant_coupon_discount, points_deduction, used_points, points_status, coupon_user_id, merchant_coupon_user_id, seckill_id, bargain_id, promotion_snapshot, pickup_code, remark, update_time, complete_time, accept_time, prepare_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( order_sn, idempotent_key, user_id, merchant_id, pickup_point_id, address_id, consignee, phone, province, city, district, detailed_address, total_amount, pay_amount, delivery_type, status, create_time, pay_expire_time, discount_amount, delivery_fee, seckill_discount, bargain_discount, promotion_discount, coupon_discount, merchant_coupon_discount, points_deduction, used_points, points_status, coupon_user_id, merchant_coupon_user_id, seckill_id, bargain_id, promotion_snapshot, pickup_code, remark, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderSn}, #{idempotentKey}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{pickupPointId}, #{addressId}, #{consignee}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailedAddress}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{deliveryType}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{payExpireTime}, #{discountAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{seckillDiscount}, #{bargainDiscount}, #{promotionDiscount}, #{couponDiscount}, #{merchantCouponDiscount}, #{pointsDeduction}, #{usedPoints}, #{pointsStatus}, #{couponUserId}, #{merchantCouponUserId}, #{seckillId}, #{bargainId}, #{promotionSnapshot}, #{pickupCode}, #{remark}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` WHERE id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(user_deleted, 0) = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(user_deleted, 0) = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, order_id, product_id, sku_id, product_name, product_image, sku_specs, origin_price, final_price, price, quantity, item_origin_amount, item_final_amount, promotion_type FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(user_deleted, 0) = 0
AND status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = 5, cancel_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE `order` SET status = 4, complete_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3)
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id, name, address, contact_phone, business_hours, status FROM pickup_point WHERE id = #{pickupPointId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM `order` WHERE status = 0 AND pay_expire_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_expire_time <= NOW() ORDER BY pay_expire_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = 5, cancel_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status = 0 AND pay_expire_time IS NOT NULL AND pay_expire_time <= NOW()
